name: Hunab Ku
description: Hunab Ku, meaning "Only God" or "One God," represents the supreme creator deity in Mayan mythology. He is often considered to be beyond human comprehension, existing in a realm beyond duality and accessible only through spiritual transcendence. Hunab Ku is the source of all creation, the origin from which all other deities and the universe itself emanated. While not directly involved in the day-to-day affairs of the world like other Mayan gods, Hunab Ku represents the ultimate unity and potential for spiritual growth. He is the center of the Mayan cosmos, the source of energy and consciousness. Some interpretations suggest he is the force behind the cyclical nature of time and the universe's constant renewal. His influence is subtle but pervasive, representing the underlying principle of existence. He is sometimes symbolized by a square within a circle, representing the balance between the material world and the spiritual realm. While not typically depicted in Mayan art in a concrete anthropomorphic form, his presence is felt through the interconnectedness of all things and the pursuit of enlightenment. Hunab Ku is the unseen architect of reality, the ultimate source of life and the potential for transcendence. He is the ultimate abstract concept of divinity within the Mayan pantheon, a force more than a personality. He embodies the infinite possibilities of creation and the inherent unity of all existence.
subtitle: The One God, Source of All

keyMyths.title: The Breath of Creation
keyMyths.description: Hunab Ku breathed life into the void, initiating the creation of the universe and all that exists within it. This act established the foundation for the Mayan cosmos.

keyMyths.title: The Source of the Gods
keyMyths.description: All other Mayan deities are believed to have emanated from Hunab Ku, making him the ultimate progenitor. They are extensions of his divine essence.

keyMyths.title: The Center of the Galaxy
keyMyths.description: Hunab Ku is sometimes associated with the center of the Milky Way galaxy, representing a cosmic source of energy. He is the heart of the universe.
